approvals.rationale: Approves the deployable CanopyProof Cloudflare smoke-fix commit after local npm 10.9.4 install, CI, OpenNext cf:build, static asset promotion, route-safety, and admin-proxy guard checks passed.
Approves the target commit only for the guarded production workflow; GitHub Environment required reviewers, Cloudflare secrets, and production smoke tests remain mandatory before deployed status.
